description: Identity of the external inputs the pipeline consumes. Paths are relative to $ICD_SOURCE_DIR. Verify with: uv run scripts/terminology-build/verify_inputs.py

sources.icd10cm: https://www.cms.gov/medicare/coding-billing/icd-10-codes (yearly 'Code Descriptions in Tabular Order' and 'Code Tables and Index' downloads)

note: Only the files below influence the generated CodeSystems: the ICD-9 Disease Tabular RTF + CMS long descriptions, and per ICD-10 year the order file + tabular XML. Other files in the CMS/CDC zips are unused.

mimic_data.identity: MIMIC-IV-on-FHIR full dataset (PhysioNet), loaded as a Pathling Delta warehouse on the HPC node
mimic_data.fingerprint: Condition table: 5,655,376 rows; 2,445,484 codings on mimic-diagnosis-icd10 and 3,209,892 on mimic-diagnosis-icd9 before migration (see scripts/icd-migration/migration-report.json)
